entities.description: Sovereign state in North America; involved in international trade agreements and labor rights advocacy.
Sovereign state in North America; a key partner in the USMCA and subject to labor rights reviews.
United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement; a trade agreement aimed at promoting fair labor practices and trade among the three countries.
A provision within the USMCA designed to address labor rights violations and ensure compliance with labor commitments.
Mexico City-based airline providing cargo transportation services; subject to labor rights review under USMCA.

entities.entity_name: Asociación Sindical de Pilotos Aviadores de México (ASPA)
entities.description: Mexican union representing pilots; filed a petition alleging labor rights violations at Mas Air.
Date on which the ILC received the RRM petition from ASPA regarding Mas Air.

entities.entity_name: Interagency Labor Committee for Monitoring and Enforcement (ILC)
entities.description: Committee co-chaired by the United States Trade Representative and Secretary of Labor; responsible for reviewing RRM petitions.

entities.entity_name: freedom of association and collective bargaining
entities.description: Fundamental labor rights aimed at allowing workers to organize and negotiate collectively.
Date of the legitimization vote alleged to have irregularities in connection with Mas Air.

relationships.description: The United States has requested Mexico to review labor rights issues under the USMCA.
The United States is a party to the USMCA, which includes provisions for labor rights enforcement.
The Rapid Response Labor Mechanism is a policy within the USMCA aimed at addressing labor rights violations.
Mexico is subject to reviews under the Rapid Response Labor Mechanism as part of the USMCA.

relationships.tgt_id: Asociación Sindical de Pilotos Aviadores de México (ASPA)
relationships.description: ASPA filed a petition alleging labor rights violations at Mas Air.

relationships.src_id: Interagency Labor Committee for Monitoring and Enforcement (ILC)
relationships.description: The ILC reviews RRM petitions, including the one received from ASPA regarding Mas Air.
The legitimization vote on May 9, 2023, is linked to the labor rights allegations against Mas Air.

relationships.tgt_id: Interagency Labor Committee for Monitoring and Enforcement (ILC)
relationships.description: The ILC received the RRM petition from ASPA on July 31, 2023.
